label: Saltflux Stockroom
description: Saltflux Stockroom forms a sealed storage chamber adjoining the precision floor of the Saltflux Instrument Shop, constructed in dressed basalt with joints packed in salt-cement to resist the brine-laden air. Wall-to-wall shelving holds standardized bins and padded cases, each face labeled for optical components, calibration weights, and corrosion-sensitive alloys. Louvered baffles and mineral haze filters maintain a low-glare, dust-controlled environment aligned with the city’s optical discipline under Saltharrow’s hard white radiance. The floor rests on vibration-damped pads that preserve instrument integrity against Brineshade’s measurable tidal stresses.
